bricks.blueprint_yaml:
name: bottom_three_values
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 4 steps
inputs:
  values: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${inputs.values}
    do_brick: set_dict_field
    item_kwarg: value
    static_kwargs:
      data: {}
      field: v
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_1_for_each
- name: step_2_sort_dict_list
  brick: sort_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_1_for_each.result}
    key: v
    reverse: false
  save_as: step_2_sort_dict_list
- name: step_3_take_first_n
  brick: take_first_n
  params:
    items: ${step_2_sort_dict_list.result}
    n: 3
  save_as: step_3_take_first_n
- name: step_4_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_3_take_first_n.result}
    key: v
  save_as: step_4_map_values
outputs_map:
  bottom: ${step_4_map_values.result}
bricks_log_signals: bricks.ai.composer INFO Composing blueprint for task (118 chars), 102 bricks in pool
